speedscope-notification:
Body of the notification displayed after creating a forced speedscope profile.

Parameters:
* $1 - A link to the profile viewer.
* $2 - A link to the JSON of the profile.
* $3 - A link to the metadata of the profile.
speedscope-notification-link-view: Label of the link to the speedscope UI for the profile; displayed in the speedscope notification.
speedscope-notification-link-json: Label of the link to the JSON of the profile; displayed in the speedscope notification.
speedscope-notification-link-metadata: Label of the link to the metadata of the profile; displayed in the speedscope notification.
speedscope-notification-success: Title of the speedscope notification, indicating success.
speedscope-profile-previews-label: Label for the user preference which enables profile previews.
speedscope-profile-previews-help: Help text for the user preference which enables profile previews.
speedscope-parser-report-label: Label displayed in the parser report if the preview was profiled.
speedscope-parser-report-link-text: Text of the link in the parser report that leads to the speedscope profile viewer.
speedscope-editpage-profile-preview-labe: Label of the checkbox that can be ticked to generate a speedscope flamegraph for the preview.
speedscope-editpage-profile-preview-titl: Title of the checkbox that can be ticked to generate a speedscope flamegraph for the preview.
speedscope-editpage-profile-notice: Notice displayed when profiling a preview. $1 the URL for the profile viewer for the profile.
